ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Model architecture used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware configuration used for the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Last user who modified the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MOSES BLEU) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., % for accuracy) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., validation set, test set) */,
  "metric_confidence" REAL /* Confidence interval or standard deviation of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the training parameter (e.g., begin_pruning_step) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the training parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter (e.g., default, custom) */,
  "parameter_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regularizations" (
  "regularization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regularization technique */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the regularization technique belongs to */,
  "regularization_type" TEXT /* Type of regularization technique (e.g., dropout, label_smoothing) */,
  "regularization_value" TEXT /* Value or parameters of the regularization technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regularization technique */,
  "regularization_source" TEXT /* Source of the regularization technique (e.g., default, custom) */,
  "regularization_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the regularization technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regularization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regularizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "researcher_joined_at" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the organization */,
  "researcher_left_at" TEXT /* Date when the researcher left the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the log entry belongs to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  "performed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
